handoff.summary: Building VECTOR — a multi-modal real-time movement tracker. 7 pages: Command Center (/), Air Traffic (/air), City Bikes (/bikes), Subway (/transit), Flight Detail (/flights/[callsign]), Airport Hub (/airport/[code]), Watchlist (/watchlist). Data: OpenSky Network (aircraft), Citi Bike GBFS (bikes), MTA GTFS-RT (subway). Design: shadcn/ui + custom Mission Control design system (dark cockpit, amber HUD accents, monospace data). Stack: Next.js 15, Prisma, SQLite, Leaflet.js, Tailwind CSS 4. 8 scenarios planned covering rush hour, ghost city, storm chaos, event day, airport live board, single flight, empty/full watchlist. Screen sizes: Desktop 1440x900, Mobile 390x844.

projectDescription: Real-time global movement intelligence — track aircraft, city bikes, and subway trains on a single tactical command platform

frameworks.name: Next.js
frameworks.description: Full-stack React framework with App Router, SSR, and API routes

libraries.description: Accessible component library built on Radix UI

libraries.description: Interactive map library for live flight/bike/transit visualization
